name: PortAventura Park
description: PortAventura Park is a theme park located in the PortAventura World Resort, 85 km southwest of Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, in the municipalities of Salou and Vila-seca, on the Costa Daurada.  The park opened on 1 May 1995 under the management of the Tussauds Group which had a 40. 01% share in the park, La Caixa (33.
